content: Task: Wire real KalshiConnector into main.rs, add demo sandbox mode, add hybrid paper mode. Teams: Trading (primary), Engineering (code review).

Delegated to Rust Engine Dev: wire real Kalshi connector, add --demo/--production/--paper/--paper-both flags, replace mock seeding with real market matching, replace mock price feed with real WS subscription.

Implemented all changes. Replaced MockKalshiConnector with real KalshiConnector. Added --demo/--production/--paper/--paper-both flags. Demo is default. Replaced mock seeding with real Kalshi list_markets + MatchPipeline. Replaced mock price feed with real Kalshi WS + REST fallback. cargo check/clippy/test all pass (190/190).
Trading team complete. All 8 acceptance criteria pass. Ready for Engineering Code Review.
Delegated to Engineering Lead for cross-team code review. Safety-critical: must verify no accidental production access, no credential leaks, correct PaperConnector wrapping.

Initial review: REWORK. 1 CRITICAL (Polymarket env vars use .expect() instead of .context()?), 1 MAJOR (std::mem::forget leaks WS handles). 3 MINOR, 2 NIT. Production safety gate correct. No hardcoded secrets. PaperConnector wrapping correct.
Code review REWORK. 2 blocking issues sent back to Trading team.
Rework complete. Fix 1: All 5 .expect() calls replaced with .context()?. Fix 2: std::mem::forget replaced with _ws_handles Vec storage. cargo check/clippy/test all pass (190/190).
Re-review (Rework Cycle 1): APPROVE. Both CRITICAL and MAJOR findings resolved. No new issues introduced. All 9 acceptance criteria pass.
All teams complete. Trading team implemented, Engineering team approved. Task done.
